name: Twingate Codespaces
postCreateCommand: curl -s https://binaries.twingate.com/client/linux/install.sh | sudo bash && sudo bash -c 'echo "nameserver 8.8.8.8" > /etc/resolv.conf' && sudo /etc/init.d/dbus start && echo "${TWINGATE_SERVICE_KEY}" | sudo twingate setup --headless=- && sudo twingate service-start
